strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff level, not Principal or Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product depth — recent AI exposure is short (since April 2025)
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field; no recognized AI platform leadership

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and recognized AI products
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks and 15+ year tenure
Entrepreneurial/founder track record with open-source platform

response.justification: The candidate brings broad full-stack and infrastructure experience spanning over 15 years, founder-level initiative through GISCollective, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role targets a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, and the candidate's AI work appears recent and limited in scope, with prior seniority capped at Senior/Staff levels rather than Principal. Fit is partial: strong engineering generalist credentials, but a gap against the role's emphasis on deep, recognized AI leadership.
